description: A change records one edit to a Lix entity, including what changed, when it changed, and which entity was affected.

entity_pk.description: Canonical JSON primary-key tuple for the entity this change applies to, scoped by (`schema_key`, `file_id`). Values are ordered according to the target schema's `x-lix-primary-key`.

schema_key.description: Schema identifier of the entity (e.g. `lix_file_descriptor`, `lix_commit`, or a user-registered key).

file_id.description: Filesystem-scoped file identifier when the change belongs to a file; NULL for engine-internal entities (commits, versions, settings).

metadata.description: Optional user-provided JSON metadata attached to the change; NULL when nothing was supplied.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the change was recorded (set via `lix_timestamp()` at write time).

snapshot_content.description: Entity JSON body at this change; NULL represents a tombstone (deletion).
